files.patch:
@@ -1,26 +0,0 @@
-class Bird < Formula
-  desc "Fast X CLI for tweeting, replying, and reading"
-  homepage "https://github.com/steipete/bird"
-  url "https://github.com/steipete/bird/releases/download/v0.8.0/bird-macos-universal-v0.8.0.tar.gz"
-  sha256 "3d89bb404e8b0ed4ef331f0dc62d873852634ca2a814ae7a4ac7effc114320cf"
-  license "MIT"
-
-  def install
-    bin.install "bird"
-  end
-
-  def caveats
-    <<~EOS
-      bird uses X/Twitter GraphQL with local cookies by default.
-      This is an undocumented/private API and can break whenever X changes things.
-
-      Quick start:
-        bird whoami
-        bird read https://x.com/user/status/1234567890123456789
-    EOS
-  end
-
-  test do
-    assert_match version.to_s, shell_output("#{bin}/bird --version")
-  end
-end

@@ -22,7 +22,6 @@ brew install --cask steipete/tap/<name>
 
 ### Formulae
 
-- `bird` — Fast X CLI for tweeting, replying, and reading
 - `blucli` — Play, group, and automate BluOS
 - `camsnap` — One command to grab frames, clips, or motion alerts from RTSP/ONVIF cams
 - `codexbar` — CodexBar CLI (Linuxbrew)
@@ -69,7 +68,6 @@ brew uninstall --cask --zap steipete/tap/codexbar
 
 Homebrew formulae don’t support `--zap`. Delete these to “factory reset”:
 
-- `bird`: `~/.config/bird/`
 - `blucli`: `~/Library/Application Support/blu/` + `~/Library/Caches/blu/`
 - `camsnap`: `~/.config/camsnap/config.yaml`
 - `gogcli`: `~/Library/Application Support/gogcli/` (incl `keyring/`, `state/`)
